name: California Rarebit
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add white wine and heat until just simmering.
3. Stir in 2 cups of cheese until melted.
4. Add a small amount of the cheese mixture to the beaten egg, then return the egg mixture back into the cheese sauce.
5. Cook for about 1 minute while stirring.
6. Stir in Worcestershire sauce and basil; keep warm.
7. Heat remaining butter in a pan over medium heat. Sauté mushrooms until just tender, then sprinkle with garlic powder. Remove from heat.
8. Arrange toast points or triangles on individual heatproof plates.
9. Spoon the cheese sauce over the toast.
10. Top with sautéed mushrooms and sprinkle with remaining cheese.
11. Broil until bubbly.
